# Insurance Agent / Broker — Nigeria-First Research Brief

**Niche ID:** P2-insurance-agent-broker-site
**Vertical slug:** insurance-agent
**Research date:** 2026-04-25
**Agent:** replit-agent-2026-04-25-session-C

## 1. Nigerian Market Context
Nigeria's insurance penetration rate is among the lowest globally (~0.5% of GDP vs 7-8% for South Africa), despite growing middle class and regulatory push. NAICOM (National Insurance Commission) regulates both insurers and brokers/agents. Trust is the primary barrier — Nigerians distrust insurance due to claim rejection experiences. Key products: motor (third-party compulsory by law), building (compulsory for construction), life insurance, health insurance (HMO-linked), marine/cargo, and group life (employer-mandate). An insurance agent website must emphasise: NAICOM-licensed status (`naicom_verified`), claim payment track record, and WhatsApp-first service. Premiums: motor third-party ₦15,000–₦45,000/year; comprehensive motor ₦80,000–₦500,000/year; life insurance varies widely.

## 2. Trust Signals
- NAICOM licensed agent/broker status — PRIMARY trust signal
- Years of practice and claims paid record
- Insurers represented (list of underwriters: AIICO, Leadway, Stanbic IBTC, NEM, Mutual Benefits)
- "Claims settled on time" testimonials
- Licensed agent number (for display)
- CAC registration
- WhatsApp response time pledge

## 3. Key CTAs
- Primary: "Get a Free Insurance Quote" (WhatsApp)
- Secondary: "View Insurance Products"

## 4. Nigerian Insurance Context
- Motor third-party insurance is compulsory (MVOA 1950)
- ECOWAS Brown Card required for cross-border vehicles
- HMO/NHIS registration is growing — employer mandate
- Pension (PRA 2004) — agents may offer retirement planning
- Takaful (Islamic insurance) — significant Northern Nigeria market

## 5. Website Structure
- Home: hero + NAICOM badge + product summary + free quote CTA (WhatsApp)
- About: licensing, years of practice, underwriters partnered with
- Services: all insurance products with premium ranges in NGN
- Contact: WhatsApp quote + phone + office address

## 6. Platform Invariants
- T4: all premiums in kobo integers
- P2: NGN premiums, NAICOM badge, Nigerian insurance products
- CSS namespace: .ia-
